feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can I create Adaptation Project from my custom Fiori element (Analytic List Report Template) ?
entry.content:
Hi,
 I have created my new custom Fiori Element Application that uses Analytic List Report Template
My new custom application is deployed on SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud Edition
Then, I try to use BAS to create a new Adaptation Project to extend my custom Fiori Element app
but I cannot find my custom Fiori Element App on the list to select
Is there anything I need to configure my app before making it in a project type of cloudReady?
or make it available on the selection list

Thank you,
Pakorn

entry.title: Fiori apps not stable
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We an issue with webdynpro Fiori app, which is related to lean requests. We are using Lean Request Lean Catalog and punchout catalogs with this app. Recently we have a case where for a list of users in particular company code the app is working from time to time. Moreover, sometime the users report that punchout catalogs are the only functionality working for them and the lean forms are not. The case cannot be reproduced in quality environment because everything is working fine. This is occurring only in productive environment. 

I would appreciate any navigation and help. 

Thanks

Nikola

entry.title: SAP fiori application 2mb file size issue
entry.content:
Subject: Issue with Handling Large Files in Fiori Application File Upload

Hi all,

I’m currently developing a Fiori application that involves file upload and download functionalities. During the file upload process, the document or file is converted into a Base64 string and sent to the SAP backend service.

However, I’m facing an issue: the Base64 string is being stored as a STRING type in the backend. While a STRING in SAP can handle up to 999,999 characters, the Base64 string of a 2 MB file exceeds this limit, often reaching around 2.1 million characters.

This limitation is causing errors or incomplete data storage in the backend.

Has anyone encountered a similar challenge or have suggestions to resolve this issue?
I’d appreciate any ideas or best practices for handling large file uploads effectively, including alternative approaches to storing and processing these files in the backend.

Thank you in advance for your insights!

entry.title: How to use MessageModel for SmartTable Odata Requests
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a Smarttable in which the user can edit and save the data. Communication takes place via Odata. I would like to receive errors from the backend (SEGW) via the message model. So that I don't have to check the response of the request myself.

MessageModel is bound to the EntitySet, as is the table.

The binding is set to the MessageModel but At the moment I always get the error message “Error parsing OData messages: TypeError: i.checkUpdate is not a function” in the ODataMessageParser. 
 
Any idea what I am doing wrong?

entry.title: Hoe can I change the Loss Price difference account to another account through configuration settings
entry.content: Is it possible to change the Loss Price difference account to another account through configuration settings? Also, what is the method for changing this setting

entry.title: Generate a pdf invoice for a bill with Fiori UI5
entry.content: I need to generate an invoice for bills in pdf format. When the user clicks on the invoice option, the pdf bill need to generate and download. I have attached image for your reference. Which package/library should i use to generate a pdf in capfiori. Please help  me with references.

entry.title: Basic Authentication not working in BAS or CICD
entry.content:
Hi,

I am following the following tutorial with the Trial BTP Account:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/set-up-cicd.html

It asks in here to create credentials for Cloud Foundry. However, on the trial account, the credentials I use to log into BTP account do not work even with BAS, from where I have published the app being used in here. The credentials do not work on using them in Continuous Integration and Delivery either, as expected.

 

On BAS, I am only able to log into Cloud Foundry using SSO Temporary Authentication Code, but from the given authentication options, I am not sure how to log into CF. 

Could someone please help?

Thanks

entry.title: Actions on table fields in object page of SAP Fiori list report app
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have created a Fiori List Report application using a template with CAPM CDS. On the object page I have a table along with header section. I want to manipulate the fields in the table upon selection of first field of the table and also enable/disable few fields.

 

As it is template generated code, I am not able to find out a place to write the code for same.

Is there any option to achieve the same in controller/cds/anywhere else.

Awaiting positive responses from all the experts.

 

Regards,

Chaitali

entry.title: How to add custom menu button in the object page header of sap Fiori elements
entry.content: Is it possible to add a custom menu button (similar to a share button) to the header of an object page, as illustrated in the image below? Whenever I attempt to add a custom action in the manifest file, it only results in a standard button. Could you please provide links or resources if this is feasible?

entry.title: How to do navigation in smarttable from master to detail page
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need help in navigation and routing using parameters in smarttable. I have done it in normal table and list but not able to do in smarttable [not able to fetch data in details page]. Thank you all in advance. There should be smartfilterbar also...

entry.title: Report for Custom MIRO
entry.content:
Hello All,

Kindly let me know if there is any Standard report for CUSTOM MIRO in s/4 HANA?
Please help with the steps..

entry.title: How can I add "custom fields" on filter conditions and matchcodes to enhance research
entry.content:
We created some custom fields in the material master data and we want to use them as filter conditions to research materials on item level for the apps :

 

How can I add "custom fields" on filter conditions and matchcodes to enhance research


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: The data is not getting updated in the DB, on executing CAP Odata V4 service from SAP UI5 App
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm facing a problem while creating records in my HANA cloud trial instance. The data is not getting updated in the HC DB, however on executing service (it is a CAP Odata V4) from SAP UI5 app, the response is '201 Created'.

SAPUI5 code;

service.cds :

And schema.cds is as follows:

Any thoughts what is the reason and suggestions for possible resolution?

Thanks,

Varad

entry.title: How to Edit Multiple Selected Items Individually in a List Report Using an Action Button?
entry.content:
I have a List Report in my SAP Fiori Elements application, and I want to allow the user to select multiple lines and then click on an action button to edit each line individually.

Currently, my action button accepts a parameter where I can pass a single value. However, this value is static, meaning it applies the same value to all selected items, which doesn't allow flexibility for individual changes.

What I'm trying to achieve is the ability to dynamically pass different values (e.g., a unique part number) for each selected row when the button is clicked. I would like to know how I can flexibly manage dialog parameters for each selected item, or if there's a better approach to achieve this functionality in the context of a List Report with SAP RAP.

Has anyone implemented something similar or can suggest a solution for this scenario?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: File content shows aria label text
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We are using below code to define an upload functionality, however it appends "aria-labelledby="__label27" after the file content. refer snapshot below. How can we resolve this. Upon refreshing the page, this problem goes off and we see only the hyperlinked file.

Regards

Toolika

reference code:

 UI.MediaResource: {Stream: DocumentContent },
    UI.LineItem #SupportingDocumentLI: [
        { $Type: 'UI.DataField', Label: 'Document Name', Value: DocumentName, @Common.FieldControl: #ReadOnly, ![@HTML5.CssDefaults]: { $Type: 'HTML5.CssDefaultsType', width: '33%'}, },
        { $Type: 'UI.DataField', Label: 'Document Type', Value: DocumentType,![@HTML5.CssDefaults]: { $Type: 'HTML5.CssDefaultsType', width: '34%'}, },// @Common.FieldControl: #ReadOnly  },
        { $Type: 'UI.DataField', Label: 'Document', Value: DocumentContent, @Common.FieldControl: #ReadOnly, ![@HTML5.CssDefaults]: { $Type: 'HTML5.CssDefaultsType', width: '33%'}, },
    ],

entry.title: Error Message 005 retroactive posting not allowed
entry.content:
When I try to change the item on the provisioning sheet, according to the invoice in ML81N, I get the message “005 retroactive posting not allowed”.

Provisioning Dec/2023; invoice Jan/2024

How could I resolve this issue?

Tks in advance.

entry.title: Please can someone explain how to unflag for deletion a reference operation set. (cp 431)
New GL account does not reflect when adding new item in PR
entry.content:
Dear MM experts, 

Would like to seek your expertise on below test scenario with dummy data to represent the issue:

(1) Material A is tagged to valuation class 0001, GL 10000000.

(2) PR and subsequently PO was raised with material A and the PR/PO has reflected accordingly with GL 10000000.

(3) Noticed the GL tagged is incorrect. Thus, changed the valuation class for Material A to 0002 (GL 20000000).

(4) In the PR, a new line item was added after the changes. However, the GL for the new line item remained 10000000

(5) When a new PR was raise, the GL reflected correctly as 20000000.

Would like to understand the system behavior as previously if there is account determination error, we will correct the valuation class and retrigger change in PO to reflect new GL but in this case there was no account determination error but merely changes of VC to reflect another GL account. Will system not allow the same material input with different GL account in the PR?

entry.title: How to deploy Custom UI5 application onto SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public edition?
entry.content:
Hi community,
I have a scenario for creating a custom application and deploying it as a tile on the S4 HANA Cloud Public edition's FLP.

Using eclipse ADT, I have connected my dev system of HANA Public Cloud, and created a Custom Package under the Super package ZCUSTOM_DEVELPOMENT (so that the development objects can be moved to T and P systems).

My custom package holds the following objects:

  1. Custom database tables
  2. Custom ABAP Classes to handle the logic on the tables
  3. The IAM application / Business Configurations (based on few tables) to maintain data from the user side
  4. Custom root view entities on top of the ABAP classes
  5. The  service bindings and service definitions of the custom root view entities (their respective authorization objects).
  6. Custom Business catalog to store the IAM applications which are published to the HANA Cloud.

Process: (Backend)

  1. Created custom Z* Package to store the custom build objects.
  2. Created database tables to store the data.
  3. For a few tables, the business configuration objects are created to expose those tables on the HANA Cloud to maintain data.
  4. Created custom ABAP classes to handle the logic on the data in the custom tables.
  5. Created custom root entities and implemented the if_rap_query_provides~select method to handle the HTTPS calls when the root entities are exposed as an API. (Ref: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-a4c-create-custom-entity.html)
  6. Created a service definition for the custom root entity.
  7. Created service binding on top of the service definition to expose them as an OData V4 API.

Process: (Frontend)

  1. Create BTP destination do SAMLAssertion authentication type to connect the HANA cloud system. (Ref: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/31876c06f99645f289d802f9c95fb62b.html?locale=en-US)
  2. Created a custom UI application using the template.
  3. Consume the exposed Odata V4 services in the application by providing the endpoints in manifest.json file, configure the BTP destination in UI5.yaml and xs-app.json file to connect the application to backend system.
  4. The application loads successfully and in the preview mode and the data flows in preview mode.
  5. Build the mta.yaml file to generate the .mtar file.
  6. Deploy the .mtar file to deploy the application to BTP.
  7. On successful deployment, the application is available under HTML5 Applications in BTP.

After performing all these step, how can we add this developed custom application as a FIORI tile onto the S4 HANA Public cloud FLP under a custom catalog, Custom role, custom space and page?

Tried Scenario:

  1. Create a custom tile using the application Custom Tiles on HANA Cloud Public edition FLP.
  2. Provided the deployed application URL in the details of the custom tile.
  3. During assigning the catalog, The custom catalog in which the IAM applications are added is not visible in the list of catalogs to assign. Rather it shows all the SAP Standard business catalogs

How to add this custom tile to the custom business catalog created using ADT on eclipse?

Regards,
Shyam Prasad.

entry.title: app/router preview looking for a deleted project's path instead of it's own
entry.content:
Hello,

As a newbie at UI5 development, I am following the tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-ui.html

 

I decide to delete the original app MyHANAApp and instead created another App MyHANAApp2.

When I try to preview the ports, they do not work.

On previewing app/router, I got the below error:

#2.0#2024 12 02 18:00:02:348#+00:00#INFO#/Configuration#####m47c58h8##########m47c58h8#PLAIN##Replacing $XSAPPNAME will not take place - 'xsappname' property not found in UAA configuration.#

However, my package.json has the package name as MyHANApp2 and my mta.yaml also has the same name everywhere. On previewing Port 5000 from within MyHANAApp2, it gives the below error:

Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.css'
    at Object.readFileSync (node:fs:457:20)
    at get html [as html] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/app/index.js:10:16)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/@sap/cds/server.js:85:39
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:149:13)
    at Route.dispatch (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/route.js:119:3)
    at Layer.handle [as handle_request] (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/layer.js:95:5)
    at /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:284:15
    at Function.process_params (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:346:12)
    at next (/home/user/projects/MyHANAApp/node_modules/express/lib/router/index.js:280:10)

 

It looks for MyHANAApp which I have already deleted. 

Also I connected the app with the new HANA Cloud Instance MyHANAApp2-Dev, and deleted the previous HDI Container, However, on going to the Database Explorer tab and refreshing , it does not show the container, but on navigating directly from My HANA Projects or searching manually within the Database Explorer using the + icon, I am able to load the DB Container. Although I think this is irrelevant, but thought of mentioning still

 

I do not want to create a new project with the exact same name as the tutorial, so that I can understand how the various components are interlinked, by resolving this error.

 

It is possible, that I might be a little vague in describing the problem, please let me know if I missed out anything, or should explain anything else in more detail.

 

Thanks
